transcription.text: This is the story of Tubby, the color television tube. Tubby was fat and round. A misfit, a round tube in a rectangular hole. Tubby sat in a big, clumsy box that just didn't seem to fit anywhere. Why can't I be rectangular and slim like the black and white tubes? I'd be handsome. Why not indeed, said Motorola. So they made Tubby rectangular, beautiful, and slim. They put him in a handsome, compact cabinet that fits anywhere. Don't ever call me Tubby again, said the new slim tube. Just handsome. Don't get a Tubby round color set. Get a Motorola rectangular. Now on display at your local dealers. Come in and see Color 65 from Motorola. Color 65.

segments.text: This is the story of Tubby, the color television tube.
A misfit, a round tube in a rectangular hole.
Tubby sat in a big, clumsy box that just didn't seem to fit anywhere.
Why can't I be rectangular and slim like the black and white tubes?
So they made Tubby rectangular, beautiful, and slim.
They put him in a handsome, compact cabinet that fits anywhere.
Don't ever call me Tubby again, said the new slim tube.
Don't get a Tubby round color set.
Now on display at your local dealers.
Come in and see Color 65 from Motorola.
